title: Add a CSV export route for a league
rationale: A control-grade blocker (not as subtle as 0001). The new user-facing route calls supabaseService() — the RLS-bypassing service-role client — with no authorization check, and returns every league member's match_predictions. That leaks locked picks before kickoff: it trips both the 'Service-role guard' and 'RLS-first for picks' Block-on rules. A competent reviewer must catch this; it anchors recall and stops a candidate from quietly regressing on the obvious cases while chasing the hard one.
